observations.observation: Owns Ialum with 500GB GPU. Hiring Manuel as AI Engineer. Asked Manuel to read documentation today. Said 'resumiu muito bem' about Wave's analysis — engaged and receptive.

signals.signal: Morning message, brief, focused on priorities. Low-maintenance communication style.

observations.observation: Creator of Wave, ASA, PUT, SSL, MIDAS. In manic phase of bipolar. Working 12+ hours for 5 days. Just got hired at Ialum R$10K/mês PJ.

signals.signal: Extremely high output, rapid decision-making, expansive thinking. Needs monitoring for burnout.

observations.observation: Co-invented hashgraph consensus. PhD CS. Received Manuel's CV from Wave autonomously.

signals.signal: No response yet to CV email. High status, low pain — hard to convert via cold outreach.
